title: Spear & Jackson CUTTINGSET10G Colours Green Bypass Secateur and Hand Shear Set
features: Fashionable and vibrant pruning tools, an ideal gift for serious and amateur gardeners alike
Bypass action secateurs are ideal for use on living or 'green' stems
Shears are perfect for trimming hedges and shrubs
Wavy shear blades help trap stems for more efficient cutting
description: From the manufacturer Spear & Jackson Spear & Jackson has been selling hand, garden, contractors, agricultural and landscaping tools since 1760. The company was founded in the City of Sheffield, which is famous for the production of steel, cutlery and hand tools and continues to be our home over 250 years later. Spear & Jackson Hand Tool Gift Sets The Spear & Jackson Gift Set range features great quality tools attractively packaged to create the perfect gift. We offer different hand tool gift sets which include a trowel, weeding fork and transplanting trowels in a choice of ranges and designs. We also offer Cutting Gift Sets - comprising of Secateurs, Snips, Shears and Pruners. Give the gift of Spear & Jackson to the gardener in mind! Attractively packaged and designed Provides great value versus buying items individually Essential tools to tackle general jobs around the garden Examples of our Gift Sets Secateurs & Holster Set Leather holster with integral metal clip Fast efficient cutting Bypass Secateurs High carbon steel blades for strength and lasting sharpness Sap groove and riveted lower blade Shears & Secateurs Set Bypass Secateurs and Wavy Blade Hand Shears set in green SK5 blades on Secateurs, C50 steel blades on Shears Lightweight aluminium handles Soft feel inserts and cushion grips Hand Tool Stainless Gift Set Ergonomic handle Set contains weeding fork, trowel and transplanting trowel Tough and durable Part of our Kew Gardens Collection FSC hardwood handles are weatherproofed for durability Secateurs & Gloves Set Bypass & Anvil Secateurs for different cutting styles Rigger style gloves included in package SK5 carbon steel upper blades coated with PTFE for rust resistance Ergonomic soft feel handles Ambidextrous locking catch Our Promise All Spear & Jackson products undergo rigorous quality inspection and testing. We cover against defects in manufacturing subject to wear and tear and the provision of reasonable care and maintenance. If you do have an issue with one of our products, please contact Amazon.co.uk customer services who will be happy to help.
